question: Who was born first, Ronnie Radke or Dave Brockie? Write your answer as [ANSWER].

1.fact: Ronnie Radke: Ronald Joseph Radke (born December 15, 1983) is an American singer, songwriter, entertainer, and record producer born in Las Vegas, Nevada.

2.fact: Dave Brockie: David Murray Brockie (August 30, 1963 - March 23, 2014) was a Canadian musician, best known as the lead vocalist of the metal band Gwar.

reasoning_chain: Node 1 and Node 2: Ronnie Radke was born on December 15, 1983, while Dave Brockie was born on August 30, 1963, so Dave Brockie was born first. -> Dave Brockie

reasoning_hops.reasoning: Node 1 and Node 2: Ronnie Radke was born on December 15, 1983, while Dave Brockie was born on August 30, 1963, so Dave Brockie was born first. -> Dave Brockie
